title: R2 Audit Subset Per-Class Coverage Record (§1.1 b-stage output)
description: Schema for runs/_r2_audit_coverage.json. Per-class records describing whether the stratified audit subset achieves rule-disagreement-sentinel coverage (≥5 instances) for each safety-critical class. Consumed by _r2_decide_precision.py with hash-pin via runs/_r2_audit_coverage.json.sha256: low_power → confidence-downgrade write; construction_failed → escape outcome (degraded-confidence detector flag). Status thresholds (covered ≥ 5 / low_power 1-4 / construction_failed 0) and audit_low_power threshold (audit_support < 30) are derived from elegant-sauteeing-quail LOCK-iter-3; cross-field consistency between status and audit_support is enforced below via conditional rules. Per-record uniqueness on (class_id, class_name) is unenforceable in draft-07 (uniqueItems compares full records); writers/verifiers MUST call scripts/_r2_schema_utils.py::validate_and_enforce(records, schema_path, unique_keys=['class_id', 'class_name']) — see UNIQUENESS_KEYS in _r2_schema_utils for the canonical mapping.

class_id.description: Numeric class ID matching R2 dataset manifest (frozen at §1.1 a-stage). Per-record uniqueness on (class_id, class_name) is writer-enforced.

class_name.description: Human-readable class label matching R2 dataset manifest (e.g. red, redLeft, barrier_up). Frozen at §1.1 a-stage.

full_val_support.description: Instance count for this class in the frozen R2 val set.

full_val_insufficient.description: Convenience flag = (full_val_support < 30). Writer-derived from elegant-sauteeing-quail safety-class blocking rule. Schema cross-checks it below.

audit_support.description: Instance count for this class in the stratified audit subset.

audit_coverage_status.description: covered = audit_support >= 5; low_power = 1 <= audit_support <= 4; construction_failed = audit_support == 0. Cross-field rule below pins these.

audit_low_power.description: Flag = (audit_support < 30). Distinct from audit_coverage_status — the latter gates rule-disagreement-sentinel viability (≥5), this one gates AP-estimator credibility (≥30). Schema cross-checks below.

construction_failure_reason.description: Required only when audit_coverage_status=construction_failed; otherwise must be omitted. Free-text describing why stratified sampling could not place a single instance (e.g. 'class absent from val set entirely', 'all instances filtered by scenario-tag stratification').
